rules.rule_text:
rule fragus_js_vml
{
	meta:
		author = "Josh Berry"
		date = "2016-06-26"
		description = "Fragus Exploit Kit Detection"
		hash0 = "8ab72337c815e0505fcfbc97686c3562"
		sample_filetype = "js-html"
		yaragenerator = "https://github.com/Xen0ph0n/YaraGenerator"

	strings:
		$string0 = " 0x100000;"
		$string1 = "            var gg "
		$string2 = "/g, document.getElementById('divid').innerHTML));"
		$string3 = "                                var sss "
		$string4 = "                }"
		$string5 = "                        document.body.appendChild(obj);"
		$string6 = "                                var hbs "
		$string7 = " shcode; }"
		$string8 = " '<div id"
		$string9 = " hbs - (shcode.length"
		$string10 = "){ m[i] "
		$string11 = " unescape(gg);"
		$string12 = "                                var z "
		$string13 = "                                var hb "
		$string14 = " Math.ceil('0'"

	condition:
		14 of them
}
